1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'The ruqba (conditional gift) goes to the heir.'
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Ruqba (hibah bersyarat) diberikan kepada ahli waris.'

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß granted a concession to the owner of an ariyya (gift of produce) to sell it by estimation.
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß memberi keringanan kepada pemilik 'ariyya (hibah buah-buahan) untuk menjualnya berdasarkan taksiran.

3.iwh_en: It was narrated that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'May Allah forgive Rafi' ibn Khadij — by Allah, I know this hadith better than him. Two men who had been fighting came, and the Messenger of Allah ß said: "If this is your way, then do not rent out farmland." Rafi' then heard only the words "do not rent out farmland."'
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Semoga Allah mengampuni Rafi' ibn Khadij — demi Allah, aku lebih mengetahui hadith ini darinya. Dua orang yang sedang bertengkar datang, lalu Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Jika demikian keadaan kalian, maka janganlah menyewakan tanah pertanian." Rafi' hanya mendengar kalimat "janganlah menyewakan tanah pertanian."'

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'When the surah "When the help of Allah comes and victory" was revealed, the Messenger of Allah ß recited it to the end and said: "The people are one group and I and my companions are another group." He also said: "There is no migration after the conquest, but there is jihad and intention." Marwan said to him: "You have lied," while Rafi' ibn Khadij and Zayd ibn Thabit were seated with him on the bed. Abu Sa'id al-Khudri said: "If these two wished, they would have told you." Marwan raised his whip to strike him, but when they saw that, they said: "He spoke the truth."'
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Ketika surah "Apabila datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan" diturunkan, Rasulullah ß membacanya hingga selesai dan bersabda: "Manusia adalah satu kelompok dan aku beserta sahabat-sahabatku adalah kelompok lain." Beliau juga bersabda: "Tidak ada hijrah setelah penaklukan, tetapi ada jihad dan niat." Marwan berkata kepadanya: "Engkau berdusta," sementara Rafi' ibn Khadij dan Zayd ibn Thabit duduk bersamanya di atas ranjang. Abu Sa'id al-Khudri berkata: "Seandainya kedua orang ini mau, mereka pasti menceritakanmu." Marwan mengangkat cambuknya untuk memukulnya, tetapi ketika mereka melihat itu, keduanya berkata: "Dia benar."'

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß went out to Uhud and some people who had gone out with him turned back. The companions of the Messenger of Allah ß were divided into two groups regarding them: one group said they should be killed, and another said no. Then Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, revealed: "What is the matter with you that you are divided into two groups concerning the hypocrites?" The Messenger of Allah ß then said: "Verily it (Madinah) is pure, and it repels filth as fire repels the dross of silver."
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß berangkat menuju Uhud, dan beberapa orang yang keluar bersamanya berbalik. Para sahabat Rasulullah ß terbagi menjadi dua kelompok mengenai mereka: satu kelompok mengatakan mereka harus dibunuh, dan kelompok lain mengatakan tidak. Kemudian Allah Yang Maha Perkasa menurunkan: "Mengapa kamu terbagi menjadi dua golongan mengenai orang-orang munafik?" Rasulullah ß lalu bersabda: "Sesungguhnya ia (Madinah) suci, ia menyingkirkan kotoran sebagaimana api menyingkirkan karat perak."

6.iwh_en: It was narrated that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß forbade us from mukhabara.' I asked: 'What is mukhabara?' He said: 'Leasing land for half, a third, or a quarter of the produce.'
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Rasulullah ß melarang kami dari mukhabara.' Aku bertanya: 'Apa itu mukhabara?' Beliau bersabda: 'Menyewakan tanah dengan separuh, sepertiga, atau seperempat hasil panen.'

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß set up a small enclosure in the mosque, and the Messenger of Allah ß used to pray in it at night. The people came to know of this, so they gathered around him. Then one night the Messenger of Allah ß did not come out to them, and they raised their voices and threw pebbles at the screen. The Messenger of Allah ß came out to them in anger and said: "O people, you should pray in your homes, for the best of a man's prayer is in his home except for the obligatory prayers."'
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit al-Anshari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß membuat bilik kecil di masjid, dan Rasulullah ß biasa shalat di dalamnya pada malam hari. Orang-orang mengetahui hal ini, lalu mereka berkumpul di sekelilingnya. Kemudian pada suatu malam Rasulullah ß tidak keluar menemui mereka, sehingga mereka meninggikan suara dan melempar kerikil ke tirai. Rasulullah ß keluar menemui mereka dalam keadaan marah dan bersabda: "Wahai manusia, shalatlah kalian di rumah kalian, karena sebaik-baik shalat seseorang adalah di rumahnya, kecuali shalat fardhu."'

8.iwh_en: It was narrated that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said to Marwan: 'Did I not see you last night reading briefly in the two rak'ahs of Maghrib? By the One in Whose hand is my soul, the Messenger of Allah ß used to recite long surahs in them — al-A'raf, Yunus, and Hud.'
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata kepada Marwan: 'Bukankah aku melihatmu tadi malam membaca singkat dalam dua raka'at Maghrib? Demi Dzat yang jiwaku ada di tangan-Nya, Rasulullah ß biasa membaca surah-surah panjang di dalamnya — al-A'raf, Yunus, dan Hud.'

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ß went out to Uhud, some people who had gone out with him turned back. The companions of the Messenger of Allah ß were divided into two groups: one group said they should be killed, and another said no. So Allah revealed: "What is the matter with you that you are divided into two groups concerning the hypocrites?"'
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ß berangkat menuju Uhud, sebagian orang yang keluar bersamanya berbalik. Para sahabat Rasulullah ß terbagi menjadi dua kelompok: satu kelompok mengatakan mereka harus dibunuh, dan kelompok lain mengatakan tidak. Maka Allah menurunkan: "Mengapa kamu terbagi menjadi dua golongan mengenai orang-orang munafik?"'

10.iwh_en: It was narrated that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß forbade us from mukhabara.' He was asked: 'What is mukhabara?' He said: 'Taking a portion of the land's yield as payment.'
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: 'Rasulullah ß melarang kami dari mukhabara.' Beliau ditanya: 'Apa itu mukhabara?' Beliau berkata: 'Mengambil sebagian hasil tanah sebagai pembayaran.'

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said regarding the verse: "What is the matter with you that you are divided into two groups concerning the hypocrites, while Allah has cast them back for what they earned" — Some people from the companions of the Messenger of Allah ß turned back from Uhud.',
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata tentang ayat: "Mengapa kamu terbagi menjadi dua golongan mengenai orang-orang munafik, padahal Allah telah membalikkan mereka disebabkan usaha mereka" — Sebagian sahabat Rasulullah ß berbalik dari Uhud.'

12.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he ate the pre-dawn meal (suhur) with the Messenger of Allah ß, then they went out to pray. Anas said: 'I asked Zayd: "How long was it between that (the suhur) and the Fajr prayer?"' He replied: 'The time it takes to recite fifty verses.'
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia makan sahur bersama Rasulullah ß, kemudian mereka keluar untuk shalat. Anas berkata: 'Aku bertanya kepada Zayd: "Berapa lama jarak antara itu (sahur) dan shalat Fajr?"' Beliau menjawab: 'Selama membaca lima puluh ayat.'

13.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß granted a concession regarding the sale of araya (gift palms) by their estimated weight in dried dates.
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß memberi keringanan mengenai penjualan 'araya (pohon kurma hibah) dengan taksiran beratnya dalam kurma kering.

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about a husband and a full sister as heirs. He gave the husband half and the sister half. When he was questioned about this, he said: 'I was present with the Messenger of Allah ß and he gave that ruling.'
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang suami dan saudara perempuan kandung sebagai ahli waris. Ia memberikan setengah kepada suami dan setengah kepada saudara perempuan. Ketika ia ditanya tentang hal ini, ia berkata: 'Aku hadir bersama Rasulullah ß dan beliau memberikan putusan demikian.'

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When we were copying the masahif (Quran manuscripts), I noticed a verse from Surah al-Ahzab was missing that I used to hear the Messenger of Allah ß recite. I found it with Khuzayma al-Ansari: "Among the believers are men who have been true to their covenant with Allah."'
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika kami menyalin mushaf, aku mendapati sebuah ayat dari Surah al-Ahzab hilang yang biasa aku dengar dibaca oleh Rasulullah ß. Aku menemukannya pada Khuzayma al-Anshari: "Di antara orang-orang mukmin terdapat orang-orang yang menepati apa yang mereka janjikan kepada Allah."'

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to Marwan: 'Why do I see you reciting short surahs in Maghrib? I saw the Messenger of Allah ß reciting the two long surahs in Maghrib.' Ibn Abbas said: 'What are the two long surahs?' He replied: 'Al-A'raf and Yunus or Yusuf.'
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada Marwan: 'Mengapa aku melihatmu membaca surah-surah pendek dalam shalat Maghrib? Aku telah melihat Rasulullah ß membaca dua surah panjang dalam Maghrib.' Ibnu Abbas bertanya: 'Apa dua surah panjang itu?' Beliau menjawab: 'Al-A'raf dan Yunus atau Yusuf.'

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "May Allah make radiant a person who hears my words, retains them, and conveys them to others. Many a bearer of knowledge conveys it to one more understanding than himself."'
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Semoga Allah mencerahkan wajah seseorang yang mendengar perkataanku, mengingatnya, lalu menyampaikannya kepada orang lain. Banyak orang yang membawa ilmu menyampaikannya kepada orang yang lebih memahaminya."'

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'A verse from Surah al-Ahzab was missing when we copied the masahif — a verse I used to hear the Messenger of Allah ß recite. I found it with Khuzayma al-Ansari: "Among the believers are men who have been true to their covenant with Allah."'
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sebuah ayat dari Surah al-Ahzab hilang ketika kami menyalin mushaf — ayat yang biasa aku dengar dibaca oleh Rasulullah ß. Aku menemukannya pada Khuzayma al-Anshari: "Di antara orang-orang mukmin terdapat orang-orang yang menepati apa yang mereka janjikan kepada Allah."'

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Abu Bakr sent for me after the Battle of Yamama, and Umar was sitting with him. Abu Bakr said: "O Zayd ibn Thabit, you are a young man and intelligent. We have no suspicion of you. You used to write down the revelation for the Messenger of Allah ß, so trace and compile the Quran."'
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Abu Bakr mengutus orang untuk memanggilku setelah Pertempuran Yamamah, dan Umar sedang duduk bersamanya. Abu Bakr berkata: "Wahai Zayd ibn Thabit, engkau adalah pemuda yang cerdas. Kami tidak meragukan dirimu. Engkau dahulu menulis wahyu untuk Rasulullah ß, maka lacaklah dan kumpulkanlah Al-Quran."'

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'The ruqba (conditional gift) belongs to the one who is given it conditionally, and the 'umra (life grant) belongs to the one who is given it for life.'
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Ruqba (hibah bersyarat) milik orang yang diberi hibah itu secara bersyarat, dan 'umra (hibah seumur hidup) milik orang yang diberi untuk seumur hidupnya.'

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to Marwan: 'What is the matter with you that you recite short surahs of the Mufassal in Maghrib? I have seen the Messenger of Allah ß reciting the two long ones in Maghrib.' Ibn Abbas asked: 'What are the two long ones?' He replied: 'Al-A'raf and Yunus or Yusuf.'
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada Marwan: 'Mengapa engkau membaca surah-surah pendek dari Mufassal dalam shalat Maghrib? Aku telah melihat Rasulullah ß membaca dua surah panjang dalam Maghrib.' Ibnu Abbas bertanya: 'Apa dua surah panjang itu?' Beliau menjawab: 'Al-A'raf dan Yunus atau Yusuf.'

22.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said regarding performing ablution (wudu) after eating food touched by fire.
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda mengenai berwudhu setelah memakan makanan yang disentuh api.

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "The 'umra (life grant) belongs to the heir."'
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "'Umra (hibah seumur hidup) menjadi milik ahli waris."'

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "The 'umra (life grant) belongs to the one it was given to in his lifetime and at his death."'
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "'Umra (hibah seumur hidup) menjadi milik orang yang diberikan semasa hidupnya dan setelah kematiannya."'

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Do not make conditional gifts (ruqba). Whoever makes a conditional gift, then it follows the law of inheritance."'
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Janganlah kalian membuat hibah bersyarat (ruqba). Barangsiapa membuat hibah bersyarat, maka ia mengikuti hukum waris."'

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Whoever gives a life grant ('umra), it belongs to the one it was given to in his lifetime and at his death. Do not make conditional gifts (ruqba). Whoever makes a conditional gift, then it is for the heir."'
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Barangsiapa memberikan hibah seumur hidup ('umra), maka itu milik orang yang diberikan semasa hidupnya dan setelah kematiannya. Janganlah kalian membuat hibah bersyarat (ruqba). Barangsiapa membuat hibah bersyarat, maka itu untuk ahli warisnya."'

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When the masahif (Quran manuscripts) were written, I found a verse missing that I used to hear from the Messenger of Allah ß, and I found it with Khuzayma al-Ansari: "Among the believers are men who have been true to their covenant with Allah."'
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika mushaf-mushaf ditulis, aku mendapati satu ayat hilang yang biasa aku dengar dari Rasulullah ß, dan aku menemukannya pada Khuzayma al-Anshari: "Di antara orang-orang mukmin terdapat orang-orang yang menepati apa yang mereka janjikan kepada Allah."'

28.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibn al-Daylami said: 'I came to Ubayy ibn Ka'b and said to him: "Something about Divine Decree (qadar) has occurred in my heart, and I would like you to narrate a hadith to me so that perhaps Allah will remove it from me." He said: "If Allah were to punish all the inhabitants of His heavens and earth, He would punish them without being unjust to them. And if He were to have mercy on them, His mercy would be better for them than their deeds. If you were to spend the equivalent of Mount Uhud in gold for the sake of Allah, Allah would not accept it from you until you believe in Divine Decree and know that what has come to you could not have missed you, and what has missed you could not have come to you. If you die in other than this state, you will enter the Fire." He said: "Then I went to Abdullah ibn Mas'ud," and he narrated the same. "Then I went to Hudhayfah ibn al-Yaman," and he said the same. "Then I went to Zayd ibn Thabit, who narrated to me from the Prophet ß" the same as that.'
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibn al-Daylami berkata: 'Aku mendatangi Ubayy ibn Ka'b dan berkata kepadanya: "Sesuatu tentang takdir telah terlintas dalam hatiku, dan aku ingin kamu menceritakan hadith kepadaku agar semoga Allah menghilangkannya dariku." Beliau berkata: "Jika Allah menghukum semua penghuni langit dan bumi-Nya, Dia akan menghukum mereka tanpa berbuat zalim kepada mereka. Dan jika Dia merahmati mereka, rahmat-Nya akan lebih baik bagi mereka dari amalan-amalan mereka. Jika kamu menginfakkan emas sebesar Gunung Uhud di jalan Allah, Allah tidak akan menerimanya darimu sampai kamu beriman kepada takdir dan mengetahui bahwa apa yang datang kepadamu tidak mungkin melewatimu, dan apa yang melewatimu tidak mungkin datang kepadamu. Jika kamu meninggal bukan dalam keadaan ini, kamu akan masuk Neraka." Ia berkata: "Kemudian aku pergi kepada Abdullah ibn Mas'ud," dan ia menceritakan hal yang sama. "Kemudian aku pergi kepada Hudzaifah ibn al-Yaman," dan ia berkata hal yang sama. "Kemudian aku pergi kepada Zayd ibn Thabit, yang menceritakan kepadaku dari Nabi ß" hal yang sama itu.'

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "I am leaving among you two successors: the Book of Allah and my Household (Ahl al-Bayt). They will not separate from each other until they return to me at the Pond (Hawd)."'
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Sesungguhnya aku meninggalkan di antara kalian dua pengganti: Kitab Allah dan Ahlul Baitku. Keduanya tidak akan berpisah satu sama lain hingga keduanya kembali kepadaku di Telaga (Hawd)."'

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß said: 'Perform ablution (wudu) after eating food that has been touched by fire.'
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß bersabda: 'Berwudhulah setelah memakan makanan yang disentuh api.'

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß granted a concession regarding the ariyya (gift palm) that it could be taken in exchange for its estimated amount in dates, to be eaten as fresh dates.
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß memberi keringanan mengenai 'ariyya (pohon kurma hibah) bahwa ia bisa diambil dengan imbalan taksiran beratnya dalam kurma kering, untuk dimakan sebagai kurma basah.

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß forbade muzabana and muhaqala (certain exchanges), except that he granted a concession to those with araya (gift palms) to sell them for their estimated equivalent.
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß melarang muzabana dan muhaqala (pertukaran tertentu), kecuali bahwa beliau memberi keringanan kepada orang-orang yang memiliki 'araya (pohon kurma hibah) untuk menjualnya dengan taksiran yang setara.

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We were with the Messenger of Allah ß in one of the walled gardens of Madinah which contained graves, while he was on his mule. The mule shied away and nearly threw him off, and there were five or six graves. He said: "Who knows whose graves these are?" A man said: "O Messenger of Allah, they belong to people who died in the time of Jahiliyyah." The Messenger of Allah ß said: "These people are being tortured in their graves. Were it not that you would stop burying each other, I would ask Allah to let you hear their punishment, as I can hear it."'
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami bersama Rasulullah ß di salah satu kebun berdinding di Madinah yang terdapat kuburan-kuburan, sementara beliau menunggang bagalnya. Bagal itu tiba-tiba menghindar dan hampir melempar beliau, dan terdapat lima atau enam kuburan. Beliau bersabda: "Siapa yang tahu siapa kuburan-kuburan ini?" Seorang pria berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, mereka adalah orang-orang yang meninggal pada masa Jahiliyyah." Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Orang-orang ini sedang disiksa di dalam kuburan mereka. Seandainya bukan karena kamu akan berhenti saling menguburkan, aku akan meminta Allah untuk memperdengarkan azab mereka kepadamu, sebagaimana aku dapat mendengarnya."'

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We were commanded to say subhanallah thirty-three times, alhamdulillah thirty-three times, and Allahu akbar thirty-four times after every prayer.' He said: 'One of the Ansar saw a vision in which he was told to say Allahu akbar thirty-three times, so he came and mentioned that to the Prophet ß. The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Do that."'
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami diperintahkan untuk membaca subhanallah tiga puluh tiga kali, alhamdulillah tiga puluh tiga kali, dan Allahu akbar tiga puluh empat kali setelah setiap shalat.' Ia berkata: 'Salah seorang dari Anshar bermimpi di mana ia diberitahu untuk mengucapkan Allahu akbar tiga puluh tiga kali, lalu ia datang dan menyebutkan hal itu kepada Nabi ß. Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Lakukanlah itu."'

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Perform ablution (wudu) after eating food that has been touched by fire."'
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Berwudhulah setelah memakan makanan yang disentuh api."'

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß forbade praying when the edge of the sun rises or when its edge sets, and said: 'It rises between the two horns of Shaytan.'
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß melarang shalat ketika tepi matahari mulai terbit atau ketika tepinya terbenam, dan bersabda: 'Matahari terbit di antara dua tanduk Setan.'

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ß came to Madinah, we were selling fruits before their ripeness was apparent. The Messenger of Allah ß forbade the sale of fruits until their ripeness becomes evident.'
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ß tiba di Madinah, kami menjual buah-buahan sebelum kematangannya tampak. Rasulullah ß melarang penjualan buah-buahan sampai kematangannya tampak jelas.'

38.iwh_en: It was narrated that Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) came to some people who were in their garden with traps for catching birds. He called out to them, drove them away, and said: 'Do you not know that the Messenger of Allah ß forbade hunting birds in Madinah?'
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) mendatangi beberapa orang yang berada di kebun mereka dengan perangkap untuk menangkap burung. Ia memanggil mereka, mengusir mereka, dan berkata: 'Apakah kalian tidak mengetahui bahwa Rasulullah ß melarang berburu burung di Madinah?'

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was sitting next to the Prophet ß one day when revelation came to him. He was overwhelmed by a state of tranquility, and his thigh fell on my thigh. By Allah, I have never felt anything heavier than the thigh of the Messenger of Allah ß. Then it passed, and the Messenger of Allah ß said: "Write." And he dictated to me: "Not equal are those of the believers who sit at home... and those who strive in the cause of Allah with their wealth and their lives."'
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku sedang duduk di samping Nabi ß suatu hari ketika wahyu datang kepada beliau. Beliau diliputi oleh ketenangan, dan pahanya jatuh di atas pahaku. Demi Allah, aku tidak pernah merasakan sesuatu yang lebih berat dari paha Rasulullah ß. Kemudian berlalu, dan Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Tulislah." Dan beliau mendiktekan kepadaku: "Tidaklah sama orang-orang mukmin yang duduk... dengan orang-orang yang berjihad di jalan Allah dengan harta dan jiwa mereka."'

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ß taught him a supplication and commanded him to teach it to his family every day. He said: 'Say every day: "O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in all my affairs, and I ask You for the resolve to be rightly guided, and I ask You to make me grateful for Your blessing, and to worship You well."'
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ß mengajarkan kepadanya sebuah doa dan memerintahkannya untuk mengajarkannya kepada keluarganya setiap hari. Beliau bersabda: 'Ucapkan setiap hari: "Ya Allah, aku memohon kepada-Mu keteguhan dalam semua urusanku, dan aku memohon kepada-Mu tekad untuk mengikuti petunjuk yang benar, dan aku memohon kepada-Mu agar engkau jadikan aku bersyukur atas nikmat-Mu, dan menyembah-Mu dengan baik."'

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from Syria came with olive oil for sale. He bargained with him among other merchants until he bought it from him. Then Zayd ibn Thabit came and advised him regarding the ruling on selling goods before taking possession of them.
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria dari Syam datang dengan minyak zaitun untuk dijual. Ia menawarnya di antara para pedagang lain hingga membelinya darinya. Kemudian Zayd ibn Thabit datang dan menasihatinya mengenai hukum menjual barang sebelum mengambil kepemilikannya.

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ß say: "May Allah make radiant a person who hears a saying of mine, retains it, and then conveys it. Many a carrier of knowledge conveys it to one more understanding than himself."'
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Semoga Allah mencerahkan wajah seseorang yang mendengar suatu hadith dariku, mengingatnya, lalu menyampaikannya. Banyak pembawa ilmu yang menyampaikannya kepada orang yang lebih memahaminya darinya."'

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he encountered a boy in the marketplace carrying a bird he had caught. He slapped the back of his neck and released the bird from his hand, saying: 'Do you not know, O enemy of yourself, that the Messenger of Allah ß forbade hunting in Madinah?'
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia menemui seorang anak di pasar yang membawa seekor burung yang telah ditangkapnya. Ia menepuk tengkuk anak itu dan melepaskan burung dari tangannya, berkata: 'Apakah kamu tidak tahu, wahai musuh dirimu sendiri, bahwa Rasulullah ß melarang berburu di Madinah?'

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Thabit (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I passed by the Prophet of Allah ß while he was eating suhur (pre-dawn meal) with dates. He said: "Come and eat." I said: "I intend to fast." He said: "And I am also fasting."'
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Thabit (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melewati Nabi Allah ß sementara beliau sedang makan sahur dengan kurma. Beliau bersabda: "Kemarilah dan makanlah." Aku berkata: "Aku berniat puasa." Beliau bersabda: "Dan aku juga sedang berpuasa."'

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ß said: 'Fresh fruit should not be sold for dried fruit, and no fruit should be sold until its ripeness is apparent.' Zayd ibn Thabit then met Abdullah ibn Umar and asked him about this, and he confirmed it.
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibnu Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ß bersabda: 'Buah segar tidak boleh dijual dengan buah kering, dan tidak ada buah yang boleh dijual sampai kematangannya tampak.' Zayd ibn Thabit kemudian bertemu Abdullah ibn Umar dan menanyakannya, dan ia membenarkannya.

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Shall I not inform you of the best of witnesses? He is the one who brings his testimony before being asked for it."'
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Maukah aku beritahu kalian tentang sebaik-baik saksi? Dialah yang menghadirkan kesaksiannya sebelum diminta."'

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Do not prevent the female servants of Allah from the mosques, and let them go out unscented."'
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Janganlah kalian melarang hamba-hamba perempuan Allah dari masjid-masjid, dan biarlah mereka keluar tanpa wewangian."'

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the Ashja' tribe, one of the companions of the Prophet ß, died on the day of Khaybar. This was mentioned to the Prophet ß, and he said: 'Pray over your companion.' People's faces changed upon hearing this. He said: 'He took from the war booty before it was distributed.' So they searched his belongings and found some Jewish beads worth two dirhams.
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria dari suku Ashja', salah seorang sahabat Nabi ß, meninggal pada hari Khaybar. Hal ini disebutkan kepada Nabi ß, dan beliau bersabda: 'Shalatkanlah sahabat kalian.' Wajah orang-orang berubah mendengar ini. Beliau bersabda: 'Dia mengambil dari ghanimah sebelum dibagi.' Maka mereka memeriksa barang-barangnya dan menemukan manik-manik Yahudi senilai dua dirham.

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) from the Prophet ß: 'Whoever provides the iftar for a fasting person, he will have the same reward as him, without anything being diminished from the reward of the fasting person. And whoever provides for a fighter, he will have the same reward as him.'
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Nabi ß: 'Barangsiapa yang memberi makan (iftar) kepada orang yang berpuasa, maka ia akan mendapat pahala yang sama dengannya, tanpa mengurangi sedikit pun pahala orang yang berpuasa. Dan barangsiapa yang menanggung (kebutuhan) seorang mujahid, maka ia akan mendapat pahala yang sama dengannya.'

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ß said: "Pray in your homes and do not make them graves."'
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zayd ibn Khalid al-Juhani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ß bersabda: "Shalatlah di rumah-rumah kalian dan janganlah kalian jadikan rumah-rumah itu sebagai kuburan."'
